meta.description: Fairer convolution operator-call benchmark including framework/operator setup overheads
meta.ggml_scope: ggml_conv_2d graph build and graph compute inside the timed loop; tensors/context are allocated outside the timed loop
meta.pytorch_scope: nn.Conv2d(x) call time after module creation and warmup
meta.onednn_scope: memory descriptors, primitive descriptor creation, weight reorder, dst allocation, primitive creation, execute, and stream wait inside the timed loop
